answer:
Based on the context, Hargrave initially tries to convince Laura by offering a more honorable proposal and promising to reform himself within two years. When she refuses, he escalates to harassment, threats of suicide, and eventually kidnapping her to America with the intent to rape and force her into marriage. Ultimately, none of these measures succeed, as Laura escapes and he commits suicide. 

\boxed{\text{Hargrave attempts to convince Laura by offering a reformed marriage proposal, then escalates to harassment, threats, and kidnapping, but ultimately fails.}}
